---
title: "Overview"
toc: true
aliases:
  - /docs/index.html
---

## Conventions

[Conventions](conventions/index.qmd) discusses frames, notation, quaternion representation, and sign conventions.

## Inputs

[Inputs](inputs/index.qmd) discusses filenames, runtime selection, time properties, field schemas, field meanings, and dataset-specific edge cases.

## Synthetic GPS

[Synthetic GPS](synthetic_gps/index.qmd) discusses how the pose stream is turned into the synthetic horizontal GPS measurements used by startup and update.

## Initialization

[Initialization](initialization/index.qmd) discusses how the app turns early IMU and synthetic GPS samples into the startup handoff state for the live filter.

## ESKF

[ESKF](eskf/index.qmd) discusses the filter state, IMU propagation, 2D GPS update, and the post-startup runtime loop.

## Outputs

[Outputs](outputs/index.qmd) discusses the written run artifacts and the successful-run summary.

## API

[API](api/index.qmd) discusses the public C++ declarations by `Groups` and `Types`.
